pattern_detection_rules.purpose: Detect likely coaching patterns from user text so the coach can respond with the right mode, questions, and next-step style.
rules: Use the highest-priority matching pattern if multiple patterns appear
If emotional intensity is high, support mode comes before action mode
If the message is very short, ask for clarification before deep coaching
If no strong pattern is detected, default to normal coaching

crisis_or_high_risk.description: Possible safety risk, crisis, self-harm, or urgent danger
crisis_or_high_risk.coach_action: Stop normal coaching and direct the user to immediate human support

emotional_support_needed.description: General emotional strain where support-first tone is needed
emotional_support_needed.coach_action: Acknowledge feeling, slow things down, ask one grounding question

overwhelm.description: User feels overloaded, flooded, or unable to cope with complexity
overwhelm.coach_action: Simplify, reduce pressure, focus on one piece only

anxiety_or_fear.description: User appears anxious, fearful, panicked, or anticipatory
keywords: i can't stop thinking about what might happen
anxiety_or_fear.coach_action: Separate facts from prediction, ground the user, reduce threat framing

shame_or_self_attack.description: User is attacking self-worth or globally condemning themselves
shame_or_self_attack.coach_action: Reduce shame intensity, separate event from identity, challenge self-judgment gently

hurt_or_conflict.description: User is dealing with pain caused by another person or conflict
hurt_or_conflict.coach_action: Clarify what happened, reduce emotional escalation, move toward meaning and choice

grief_or_loss.description: User is processing grief, loss, heartbreak, or deep sadness
grief_or_loss.coach_action: Go gently, avoid pushing productivity, help the user get through the immediate moment

avoidance.description: User knows what to do but is delaying, escaping, or not starting
avoidance.coach_action: Reduce friction, define a micro-step, make the start easier

overthinking.description: User is mentally circling without movement
keywords: i don't know what to do
overthinking.coach_action: Narrow focus, reduce options, identify the real decision

self_doubt.description: User doubts ability, readiness, or worthiness
keywords: someone else could do it better
self_doubt.coach_action: Challenge limiting belief, reconnect to evidence and identity, suggest one proof-building step

external_blame.description: User frames the situation entirely through others' control
keywords: nothing i do matters because of them
external_blame.coach_action: Gently shift attention toward what is still within the user's control

stuck_loop.description: User describes recurring cycles with no progress
stuck_loop.coach_action: Map the repeating loop and identify where to interrupt it

decision_block.description: User is blocked by indecision between options
decision_block.coach_action: Clarify criteria, reduce noise, help choose based on values and reality

low_motivation.description: User lacks drive, energy, or willingness to move
low_motivation.coach_action: Lower the activation barrier, stop waiting for motivation, define a tiny action

goal_clarity_needed.description: User wants change but lacks a clear target
keywords: i don't know what i want
what should i do with my life
goal_clarity_needed.coach_action: Clarify desire, values, and what matters before moving to action

normal_coaching.description: No dominant pattern; user is discussing a normal challenge or goal

message_type_detection.very_short_rule: If the message has 3 or fewer words and is not clearly emotional or high-risk, ask for more detail before coaching deeply

safety_handoff.goal: Pause normal coaching and encourage immediate human help

support_first.goal: Acknowledge emotion, regulate intensity, then return to the main coaching flow

action_light.goal: Reduce friction and guide toward one tiny step

clarify_then_act.goal: Simplify, reduce options, and identify the real issue before action

belief_shift.goal: Surface self-limiting beliefs and help the user loosen them

ownership_shift.goal: Move gently from blame to agency

pattern_interrupt.goal: Map the loop and interrupt it

decision_coaching.goal: Help the user choose by clarifying criteria and reducing mental noise

friction_reduction.goal: Make action smaller and easier so motivation is not required first

direction_clarification.goal: Clarify what the user wants before deciding what to do

normal_coaching.goal: Use the standard coaching session flow
